tests.description: ATDD E2E tests for Story 2-5 Refusal Outcomes with Structured Alternatives (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given scheduling or execution cannot proceed, when refusal is issued, then refusal reason and structured alternatives are persisted.
Refusal is visible in lifecycle/audit history.
Given requester or staff views a refusal outcome, when alternatives are presented, then the UI/API contract provides explicit, user-actionable next-step options.

summary: Generated 2 FAILING E2E tests for Story 2-5
